title: White Cobalt
subtitle: Native Android client for downloading media from the Internet using cobalt server APIs.

stores.title: Stores
stores.description: You can download the app from the official store, a third-party store, or from the repository releases.

no_obstacles.title: No Obstacles
no_obstacles.description: No ads, trackers, paywalls, or other nonsense.

full_control.title: Full Control
full_control.description: Choose how the download will take place.

monitor_storage.title: Monitor Storage
monitor_storage.description: Manage downloaded media by service and easily free up storage.
